title: Ethereal Vietnamese Corn Ca Kho To
description: A cultured, crisp, light Vietnamese dessert inspired by ca kho to, featuring caramelized corn kernels thickened with corn flour and sweetened with honey.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat.
Add grated ginger, turmeric powder, sea salt, and black pepper, and sauté until fragrant for 30 seconds.
Pour in coconut milk and honey, stirring until the mixture is smooth and begins to simmer.
Add fresh corn kernels, fish sauce, and stir to coat each kernel with the caramel sauce.
Reduce heat to low, cover the skillet, and let the corn cook for 10 minutes until tender.
Stir in corn flour dissolved in 2 tablespoons of cold water to thicken the sauce, and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove the skillet from heat and let the ca kho to rest for 5 minutes to set the caramel glaze.
Serve warm, garnished with chopped scallion, and enjoy the crisp, cultured sweetness.
